name: TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity
title: TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity
syntax: long TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity(dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char[]sysVarNameWithPath, dword useRawValue); // form 1
long TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity(dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char[]sysVarNameWithPath, dword useRawValue); // form 2
long TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity(dbNode tc, dbNode client, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char[]sysVarNameWithPath, dword useRawValue); // form 3
long TCIL_ConnectSysVarWithDataEntity(dbNode tc, dword addressClient, dword ddi, dword elementNumber, char[]sysVarNameWithPath, dword useRawValue); // form 4
description: This function connects a data entity specified by the data dictionary identifier to a system variable.

If the value of the data entity is changed, the new value is put into the system variable. To release connection between the system variable and data entity, just call the same method again, but with the empty string instead of the name of system variable.

parameters.name: ddi
parameters.description: Data dictionary identifier of the data entity, 0x0000..0xFFFF.

parameters.name: elementNumber
parameters.description: Element number of the data entity, 0x000..0xFFF.

parameters.name: sysVarNameWithPath
parameters.description: Name of the system variable, all name spaces inclusive.

parameters.name: useRawValue
parameters.description: 1: The connected system variable represents the raw value of data entity. This variant can be used even if the corresponding device descriptor object pool is not uploaded to the Task Controller simulated by TC IL. 0: The connected system variable represents the physical value of data entry. Precondition: The corresponding device descriptor object pool has to be uploaded to Task Controller simulated by TC IL and the data entry belongs to the device descriptor object pool.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Task Controller client which provides the device descriptor object pool with corresponding data entity.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the Task Controller client which provides the device descriptor object pool with corresponding data entity.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
